meaning: n.(专营巫术、秘术等所需符咒、神像等物品的) 神物铺子
examples: Baan Botanica and the Garden of Dreams, Rural BangkokFeatured in Architectural Digest and some 20 + other gorgeous magazines, books, and periodicals.
In the article, the citations in ACTA BOTANICA SINICA (1991 and 2001) were counted and comparatively analyzed by the principles and methods of reference analyses.
There were also nuanced examples from Ms. Harrison at Antica Terra (notably the 2010 Botanica) and Doug Tunnell at Brick House (another Oregon original).
